description: Use this API to modify the root path and startup group attributes of the Scenario. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariosetattrs(rootpath, startupgroup)

parameters.name: rootpath
parameters.description: Directory to be used as the root path of the scenario. (input; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: startupgroup
parameters.description: Name of the group to be designated as the startup group. (input; unchanged by default).
